context: 2025 was the year of Gims's total dominance of the French charts, with the Congolese-French rapper-singer placing multiple tracks in the year-end top 10. French rap and urban pop remained the backbone of chart activity, while SDM's street-rap collaborations with Booba signaled the continued commercial power of the Parisian rap scene. Global crossovers from Alex Warren and Lola Young also penetrated the French market.
